mechanism: OpenAI-compat `reasoning_effort` on the existing /v1 path: "none" -> think off, "high" -> think on, omitted -> endpoint default (on). The top-level `think` field on /v1 remains a NO-OP (0037 re-confirmed on this server version, arm probe_arm_v1_think_false.json: 237 reasoning chars, finish=length, empty content under the tiny cap). The native /api/chat control also honors think:false (probe_arm_native_think_false.json: content '391', done_reason=stop, eval_count=4, zero thinking) but is NOT chosen: reasoning_effort achieves generation-level control with no endpoint migration (tool_calls/finish_reason/usage/reasoning shapes unchanged).

migration_cost.tool_calls_evidence: probe_arm_v1_tools_effort_none.json: finish_reason='tool_calls', tool_calls=[{id:'call_fm6faq33', type:'function', function:{name:'grep', arguments:'{"pattern":"TODO"}'}}], reasoning_chars=0, completion_tokens=19 — the explorer's existing /v1 parsing needs NO change; native /api/chat (unchosen) also carried an id ('call_bhqjb62m') on this server version

two_factor_verdict: reasoning_effort toggles GENERATION, not just serialization: the off arm produces content within the tiny cap (finish=stop, 4 tokens, zero reasoning, no <think> leak) while on/default exhaust the cap reasoning-first (231/186 chars, empty content, 60/60 tokens) — the exact discriminator that exposed the 0037 no-op.

native_control.note: 0037's control re-confirmed live; unchosen because v1-reasoning-effort has the smaller blast radius (no endpoint migration)
